leaves.expectation_text: Identify the front cover, back cover, and title page of a book
conditions: in a physical or digital book
leaves.evidence_claim: Student identifies the front cover of a book.
leaves.non_substitutability: Does not substitute for identifying text directionality.

leaves.expectation_text: Identify the front cover, back cover, and title page of a book
conditions: in a physical or digital book
leaves.evidence_claim: Student identifies the back cover of a book.
leaves.non_substitutability: Does not substitute for identifying the title page.

leaves.expectation_text: Identify the front cover, back cover, and title page of a book
conditions: in a physical or digital book
leaves.evidence_claim: Student identifies the title page of a book.
leaves.non_substitutability: Does not substitute for identifying author/illustrator.
